name: qiankun-lab
description: qiankun 微前端学习示例：主应用 + React / Vue 子应用

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n main,react,vue -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w main" "npm run dev -w sub-react" "npm run dev -w sub-vue"
scripts.build: npm run build -w main && npm run build -w sub-react && npm run build -w sub-vue
